title: Best Gold Detectors for 2026: A Complete Price & Spec Comparison
description: Compare gold detector price tiers for 2026 with detailed specs — entry-level VLF, mid-range, and professional Pulse Induction and 3D scanners — to pick what fits your budget.
author: Rashid Ahmed

title: How to Use a Gold Detector Correctly: From Setup to Digging
description: Learn how to correctly set up and use a gold detector, from ground balancing and sensitivity to sweeping technique and digging without damaging your find.
author: Zain Malik

title: Gold Prospecting in Pakistan: Soil Types and Geological Regions
description: How soil types and geology vary across Pakistan's regions — from the Chagai volcanic belt to the northern river valleys — and what that means for choosing and ground-balancing a gold detector.
author: Farhan Khan
